library: ספריית קיימברידג' · ספריית קיימברידג' · ספריית קיימברידג'
collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description: Three fragments preserving three full lines from a legal deed in the hand of Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–38 CE). Concerning a debt. It seems that it is meant to be paid in installments over a period of 3 years. However, if a year goes by without the annual payment of 5 dinars, the entire sum must be repaid all at once. AA/ASE. Joins: Oded Zinger. NB: Further context is needed for which minute fragment among the many in T-S NS 324.m relates to this particular document (perhaps the fragment in the fourth column/fourth row in image 1r).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
